selection.description: A modder receives the eligible base title with the highest numeric priority. Qualifiers are selected independently, one per axis, and appended to the base title.
selection.priorityFormula: Add each focus rarityWeight multiplied by its required count, add 15 for each focus after the first, multiply by 100, then add the title's 1-based source row as a deterministic tie-breaker.

qualifiers.name: Lone Ranger
qualifiers.sourceCriteria: No matched mod has more than one listed author.

qualifiers.name: The Team Player
qualifiers.sourceCriteria: Between 1 and 2 matched mods have more than one listed author.

qualifiers.name: The Many-Handed
qualifiers.sourceCriteria: At least 3 matched mods have more than one listed author.
